# BizBackerz

> BizBackerz is a virtual assistance agency founded in 2024, headquartered in London, UK, serving US and UK businesses. We provide dedicated virtual assistants that handle operational tasks so business owners can focus on growth.

## What We Do

BizBackerz provides dedicated virtual assistant services to business owners, founders, solopreneurs, and growing companies. We take over time-consuming operational tasks — from administrative work and customer support to digital advertising and lead generation — through a team of expert remote professionals.

Our tagline is "Delegate to Dominate." We believe business owners should spend their time on strategic decisions, not routine execution.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2024
- Headquarters: London, United Kingdom
- US Operations: Florida, USA
- Clients Served: 50+
- Google Rating: 5.0 / 5.0
- Client Satisfaction Rate: 98%
- Tasks Completed: 500+
- Average Setup Time: 48 hours
- Operating Hours: Monday–Friday, 11:00 AM – 8:00 PM ET
- US Phone: +1 (904) 668-6362
- Email: Hello@bizbackerz.com
- Website: https://bizbackerz.com
- UK Site: https://bizbackerz.co.uk

## Services Offered

1. **Digital Advertising** — Google Local Service Ads, AI Max Search Campaigns, Performance Max, Generative Engine Optimization, B2B SaaS Lead Generation, weekly performance reporting. Average result: 25% more inbound leads vs standard search ads. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/digital-advertising

2. **Administrative Support** — Calendar and scheduling management, email management (inbox zero), data entry and organisation, document preparation, call coordination, recurring task automation. Average result: 10+ hours saved per week. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/administrative-support

3. **Customer Support** — Ticket management, email support, live chat handling, phone support, CRM management, feedback and reporting. Average result: 2-hour average response time vs 12-hour industry average. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/customer-support

4. **Social Media Management** — Content calendar creation, graphic creation, community engagement, analytics and reporting, cross-platform posting, audience growth strategy. Average result: 3× engagement increase within 90 days. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/social-media-management

5. **Content Creation** — Blog posts and articles, email sequences, social media copy, product descriptions, SEO content strategy, website copywriting. Average result: 8+ pieces per month, 65% more organic traffic. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/content-creation

6. **Lead Generation** — LinkedIn outreach, cold email campaigns, prospect research, CRM population, follow-up sequences, pipeline reporting. Average result: 30+ qualified leads per month, 85% qualification rate. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/lead-generation

7. **Project Management** — Task management, deadline tracking, team coordination, progress reporting, SOP documentation, risk management. Average result: 100% on-time delivery, 40% faster execution. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/project-management

8. **Accounting Services** — Bookkeeping, invoicing and billing, financial reporting, expense tracking, payroll support, bank reconciliation. Average result: 48-hour invoice turnaround, 98% collection rate. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/accounting-services

9. **Marketing Support** — Campaign management, email marketing, ad copy and creative briefs, landing page support, analytics and reporting, audience research. Average result: 2× campaign output, 40% more reach. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/marketing-support

10. **E-Commerce Services** — Product listing management, inventory management, order processing, customer support, sales analytics, review management. Platforms: Amazon, Shopify, WooCommerce, Etsy, eBay, Walmart. Average result: 25% sales increase, 99% listing accuracy. URL: https://bizbackerz.com/services/e-commerce-services

## How BizBackerz Works (4-Step Process)

1. **Discovery Call** — Free 30-minute session to identify goals, pain points, and current workflow.
2. **Match & Onboard** — We match you with the right assistant and configure tools within 48 hours.
3. **Start Executing** — Your assistant begins work immediately with daily updates and proactive communication.
4. **Scale With You** — Add hours, expand scope, or bring in specialists as your business grows.

## Who BizBackerz Serves

- Real estate agents and brokers
- E-commerce sellers (Amazon, Shopify, Etsy)
- SaaS founders and startup operators
- Consulting firm owners
- Marketing agencies
- Professional services businesses (legal, healthcare, finance)
- Solopreneurs and freelancers scaling their operations

## Pricing and Getting Started

BizBackerz offers flexible monthly arrangements with no long-term contracts. Pricing is based on scope, complexity, hours needed, and whether specialist skills are required. Book a free discovery call at https://bizbackerz.com/booking to receive a personalised quote.
